data.title: George Soros, Cathie Wood-Backed Autonomous Trucking Firm Kodiak Robotics Set To Go Public Via SPAC Merger To Tap $4 Trillion Market
data.description: Kodiak Robotics will go public through a merger with Ares Acquisition Corp. II, fetching a $2.5B pre-money valuation

data.title: Top 3 Materials Stocks Which Could Rescue Your Portfolio For April
Here's How The New 2025 Tesla Model Y Long Range Differs From The Limited-Run Launch Edition
data.description: Tesla releases cheaper, long-range version of Model Y Facelift, replacing the limited-run Launch Edition with a price cut of $10,000.

data.title: Ghana Tightens Control Over Gold Exports As Yellow Metal Prices Surge
data.description: Gold price in Ghana crosses $3,200/oz as government centralizes control over exports; new entity, Ghana Gold Board, aims to boost revenues and regulate industry.

data.title: Charles Schwab Tells Investors To Prioritize 'Low Volatility, High Quality' Investments Amid Century-High Tariff Turmoil
data.description: As the bond market reels from the spiking yields and the surge in volatility, analysts say "Trump put" was a potential policy response to it.
